ordering_rule.mutation_rule: source snapshot and update records remain unchanged; this manifest is derived and append-only

items.action: Materialize a deterministic continuity-owned current view from the canonical snapshot and append-only updates.

materialized_current_view.next_action: Extend the manifest through a repository-tree enumerator so future runs can prove completeness rather than relying on a curated replay list.

inferred: ordered replay yields the listed continuity-owned current view
proposed: repository-wide enumeration should replace curated input discovery
unresolved: completeness is not proven because the connector did not expose a full directory listing for operations/queue-updates

verification.method: manual deterministic replay over explicitly identified continuity-owned records
verification.limit: does not prove no additional continuity-owned update exists outside the identified inputs

falsification_or_review_route: Fetch the cited snapshot and update records, sort updates by the declared keys, apply the ownership filter, and compare the resulting item states. Falsify completeness if another continuity_mining queue update predates this manifest and is absent.
